priority_matrix.item: R15 — Replace opts._retryCount sentinel with closure parameter
R17 — Encapsulate mock server state in a class
R20 — Extract private _get() helper for GET methods in api.js
R21 — Replace onRefresh callback with Promise-returning hook
R22 — Name WebSocket frame constants in cometd-server.js
R23 — Name WS_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_MS constant in cometd.js
R24 — Standardize optional-argument pattern in fdcstream.js
R25 — Add JSDoc typedef shapes for opts bags
R26 — Remove section-divider comments in api.js
R27 — Fix getLastRequest naming and semantics in mock
R28 — Eliminate dead code and redundant constructs
R29 — Extract _parseWsFrames / _buildWsFrame helpers in test mock

implementation_sequence.item: R26 — Remove section-divider comments in api.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Purely cosmetic change with zero risk establishes a clean baseline before touching logic.

implementation_sequence.item: R28 — Eliminate dead code and redundant constructs
implementation_sequence.rationale: Removing dead code and redundant Promise.resolve wrapping reduces noise and clarifies the code before structural changes.

implementation_sequence.item: R23 — Name WS_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_MS constant in cometd.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: One-line constant addition isolated to cometd.js; no logic change, no risk.

implementation_sequence.item: R24 — Standardize optional-argument pattern in fdcstream.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Isolated style fix to a single file; completes before touching any shared modules.

implementation_sequence.item: R15 — Replace opts._retryCount sentinel with closure parameter
implementation_sequence.rationale: High-impact correctness fix; do early so all subsequent work builds on a clean retry path. No breaking API change.
Follows R15 naturally since both touch the http/auth request pipeline; eliminates the overlapping credential-write after the retry path is clean.
Isolated to cometd.js; do now while adding error emission to catch blocks in the same commit.
Isolated refactor within api.js; reduces duplication before the GET helper is added.

implementation_sequence.item: R20 — Extract private _get() helper for GET methods in api.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Builds on R19; both touch api.js, so doing them in sequence minimises context switching.

implementation_sequence.item: R22 — Name WebSocket frame constants in cometd-server.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Prerequisite for R29; naming constants first makes the extracted helpers readable from the start.

implementation_sequence.item: R29 — Extract _parseWsFrames / _buildWsFrame helpers in test mock
implementation_sequence.rationale: Depends on R22 constants being named; extract helpers after constants are in place.

implementation_sequence.item: R17 — Encapsulate mock server state in a class (includes R27)
implementation_sequence.rationale: Larger test-infrastructure refactor; done after individual mock file fixes (R22) are stable. Subsumes R27 fix for getLastRequest semantics.

implementation_sequence.item: R27 — Fix getLastRequest naming and semantics in mock
implementation_sequence.rationale: Subsumed by R17; if R17 is implemented, R27 is completed as part of it. Otherwise apply here as a standalone fix.

implementation_sequence.item: R25 — Add JSDoc typedef shapes for opts bags
implementation_sequence.rationale: Documentation pass best done near the end once all structural changes are settled, so typedefs accurately reflect the final shapes.

implementation_sequence.item: R21 — Replace onRefresh callback with Promise-returning hook
implementation_sequence.rationale: Only breaking-change recommendation; saved for last so it can be coordinated with a semver bump and changelog entry independently of all other changes.
